name: Parnaparin
description: Parnaparin is an antithrombotic and belongs to the group of low molecular weight heparins.
indication: Used in the prevention and treatment of venous thromboembolism (deep vein thrombosis and pulmonary embolism) and in the treatment of myocardial infarction.

interactions.name: Aprotinin
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Parnaparin can be decreased when used in combination with Aprotinin.

interactions.name: Mesalazine
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Mesalazine is combined with Parnaparin.

interactions.name: Balsalazide
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Balsalazide is combined with Parnaparin.

interactions.name: Olsalazine
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Olsalazine is combined with Parnaparin.

interactions.name: Aliskiren
interactions.description: Parnaparin may increase the hyperkalemic activities of Aliskiren.

interactions.name: Canagliflozin

interactions.name: Eplerenone
interactions.description: Parnaparin may increase the hyperkalemic activities of Eplerenone.

interactions.name: Palifermin
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Palifermin can be increased when it is combined with Parnaparin.

interactions.name: Pentoxifylline
interactions.description: Pentoxifylline may increase the anticoagulant activities of Parnaparin.
